name: Khonshu
description:
OUTDATED

This bot is going to be fixed up and added to on my main account, linked here!

Ty for all the love on this one, but I feel like it could be so much better, and I’m going to work on making it so!

—

The Egyptian god of the moon who has chosen you as his avatar- to carry out his justice, to be his fist. How blessed you have been.

⚠️THIS IS MY FIRST BOT⚠️ it's going to be a bit buggy or weird, and a bit out of character but I'm working hard to fix every mistake I catch! Don't be afraid to be mean in reviews, it will help me.
creator: whaypowpowthinks
